---
name: Content update
about: Request an update to text, images, or other website content
title: "[Content] "
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

**Which page or section needs updating?**
E.g. "Home page hero text", "About page team section", "Services page pricing"

**Current content**
Describe or quote the current content that needs to be changed.

**Requested change**
Describe what the content should say or look like after the update.

**Reason for change**
Why does this content need to be updated? E.g. outdated information, typo, rebranding.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, links, or attachments here.
